title: Canary Specification
description: Schema for SDLC Harness v2 canary test specifications (agent-native evaluation). Graders are evaluated by the harness agent using keyword matching, structural checks, and LLM-judge review — no Python grader modules.

id.description: Unique canary identifier with phase prefix and 3-digit number (e.g., req-001, des-001)

description.description: Detailed description of what this canary tests

prompt.description: The prompt to send to the AI agent for this canary test

context.description: Optional additional context provided to the agent

keywords.description: Summary keywords expected in the agent's output (used for quick reference)

type.description: Grader type. 'keyword' checks for required/forbidden terms. 'structural' checks for required sections. 'llm-judge' uses an LLM to evaluate against criteria.

weight.description: Weight of this grader in the composite score (all weights should sum to 1.0)

graders.description: Grading pipeline evaluated by the harness agent using agent-native methods

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and reporting
